---
pagetitle: "Best Designs"
title-block-banner: false
title-block-style: none
toc: false
include-in-header:
  - text: |
      <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/d3@7/dist/d3.min.js"></script>
      <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/highlightjs/cdn-release@11.9.0/build/styles/github.min.css">
      <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/highlightjs/cdn-release@11.9.0/build/highlight.min.js"></script>
      <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/highlightjs/cdn-release@11.9.0/build/languages/python.min.js"></script>
---

::: {.column-screen-inset }

***Best Designs Dashboard :*** Pick a `task` and a `performance target` to see the source code, performance metrics, and rollouts of the synthesized mode-switching controller.


```{=html}
<style>
#designs-dashboard { margin-top: .5rem; --dd-avail: 560px; }
.dd-controls { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 1.25rem; align-items: flex-end; margin-bottom: .75rem; }
.dd-field { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: .2rem; }
.dd-field label { font-size: .75rem; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: .04em; opacity: .7; }
.dd-field select { font-size: .9rem; padding: .25rem .4rem; border: 1px solid #aaa; border-radius: 4px; background: transparent; color: inherit; }
.dd-meta { margin: 0 0 .75rem; padding: .6rem .9rem; background: #f5f5f7; border: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,.08); border-radius: 8px; }
.dd-target { font-size: 1.0rem; margin: 0 auto .4rem; max-width: 460px; text-align: center; }
.dd-target .dd-norm { opacity: .65; }
.dd-target code { font-size: .95rem; }

.dd-main { display: flex; gap: 1rem; align-items: flex-start; }
.dd-left { flex: 1 1 0; min-width: 0; }
.dd-right { flex: 1 1 0; min-width: 0; }

.dd-metrics { width: 100%; }
.dd-metrics-grid { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: .35rem 1.5rem; align-items: flex-start; }
.dd-metrics-scalars { min-width: 0; }
.dd-metrics-modes { flex: 2 1 220px; min-width: 0; }
.dd-metrics-modes .dd-occ-title:first-child { margin-top: 0; }
.dd-metrics table { width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; font-size: .85rem; }
.dd-metrics td { padding: .15rem .4rem; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,.06); }
.dd-metrics td.dd-mk { opacity: .7; white-space: nowrap; margin-bottom: .2rem; font-size: 1rem; }
.dd-metrics td.dd-mv { text-align: right; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; font-size: 1rem; }
.dd-occ-title { font-size: 0.8rem; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: .04em; opacity: .6; margin-top: .6rem; font-weight: bolder;}
.dd-occ { display: flex; height: 12px; border-radius: 3px; overflow: hidden; margin-top: .15rem; }
.dd-occ .dd-occ-seg { height: 100%; }
.dd-occ-legend { display: flex; gap: .6rem; font-size: .85rem; opacity: .75; margin-top: .2rem; flex-wrap: wrap; }
.dd-occ-legend > span { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; }

.dd-code pre { margin: 0; height: var(--dd-avail); overflow-y: auto; overflow-x: hidden; border-radius: 6px; border: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,.1); }
.dd-code pre code.hljs { font-size: .8rem; line-height: 1.35; padding: .75rem .9rem; white-space: pre-wrap; overflow-wrap: anywhere; }

.dd-figure { margin: 0 auto; width: fit-content; max-width: 100%; }
.dd-right video { max-width: 100%; max-height: var(--dd-vid, var(--dd-avail)); width: auto; height: auto; display: block; margin: 0 auto; border-radius: 6px; background: #111; }
.dd-rollout-btns { display: flex; gap: .3rem; margin-top: .4rem; justify-content: center; align-items: center; flex-wrap: wrap; }
.dd-rollout-btns .rollout-label { font-size: .75rem; margin-right: .15rem; }
.dd-rollout-btns button {
  font-size: .75rem; padding: 1px 8px; border: 1px solid #aaa;
  border-radius: 4px; background: transparent; cursor: pointer; color: inherit;
}
.dd-rollout-btns button.active { background: #555; color: #fff; border-color: #555; }
.dd-caption { margin: .5rem 0 0; font-size: 0.87rem !important; line-height: 1.4; opacity: .8; text-align: left; }
.dd-caption .dd-caption-label { font-weight: 600; opacity: .9; }
.dd-empty { opacity: .55; font-size: .9rem; padding: 1.5rem 0; text-align: center; }

/* Stack the two columns below Bootstrap's md breakpoint (cosmo theme). */
@media (max-width: 767.98px) { .dd-main { flex-direction: column; } }
</style>

<div id="designs-dashboard">
  <div class="dd-main">
    <div class="dd-left">
      <div class="dd-controls">
        <div class="dd-field">
          <label for="dd-design" style="font-size: 0.9rem; font-weight: bolder">task</label>
          <select id="dd-design"></select>
        </div>
        <div class="dd-field">
          <label for="dd-target" style="font-size: 0.9rem; font-weight: bolder">performance target</label>
          <select id="dd-target"></select>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="dd-code" id="dd-code"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="dd-right">
      <div class="dd-meta">
        <div class="dd-target" id="dd-target-line"></div>
        <div class="dd-metrics" id="dd-metrics"></div>
      </div>
      <div id="dd-rollouts"></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<script src="designs/dashboard.js"></script>
```

:::
